channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate Democrats block homeland security funding bill as department shutdown looms – live
item.description: A DHS shutdown is all but inevitable when the stopgap measure expires on Friday Trump’s “border czar” Tom Homan kicked off his press conference today ...

item.title: Australia politics live: Tim Wilson ‘not interested’ in deputy role as Angus Taylor and Sussan Ley prepare for Liberal leadership spill
item.description: Taylor is expected to defeat Ley for Liberal leadership. Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast So far ...

item.title: Savannah Guthrie vows to ‘never give up’ as calls pour in over missing mother
item.description: Video of a masked suspect in Arizona spurs a surge of calls as the desert search near Tucson yields little evidence The Today show host Savannah Guthr...

item.title: House members seek inquiry into DoJ’s tracking of their Epstein files research
item.description: US attorney general displayed records of Congress members’ searches into Epstein files during House hearing Members of Congress are calling for invest...

item.title: Mexico sends aid to Cuba as Sheinbaum walks diplomatic tightrope with US
item.description: Much-needed supplies but no oil arrive on navy ships as Trump stokes island nation’s economic crisis As the sun came up on a flat calm Florida Straits...

item.title: IOC criticised for selling Nazi-era Olympics T-shirt
item.description: The International Olympic Committee defends the T-shirt as being part of its Heritage Collection, celebrating styles from all editions of the Games.

item.title: Trump revokes landmark ruling that greenhouse gases endanger public health
item.description: The White House calls it the largest deregulation in US history, but environmentalists say it will prove costly for Americans.

item.title: Choi, 17, denies Kim historic third halfpipe gold
item.description: Seventeen-year-old Choi Ga-on denies American great Chloe Kim snowboarding history as she brushes off an early fall to win Winter Olympic halfpipe gol...

item.title: Statement win underlines GB curlers' golden claim
item.description: Team GB's men's curlers reinforce their credentials as Winter Olympic gold medal favourites with a statement 6-3 win over Sweden.

item.title: 'Vast majority' of parents should be involved if children question their gender, schools told
item.description: School leaders welcome the "greater clarity" on how to handle the polarising issue for parents and pupils.
